'''''Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi'': Prima's Official Hints and Tips''' is a [[Star Wars video games|video game]] strategy guide written by [[Anthony James]] and published by [[Prima Games]] for the [[1997]] game ''[[Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi]]'' in [[March]] [[1998]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
'''Master the deadly art of Teräs Käsi!'''

From the icy terrain of Hoth to the sand dunes of Tatooine, battles are being waged by the likes of Luke Skywalker and Darth Vader.

With this guide, defeat Arden Lyn and discover:
*All the Force-guided power moves
*How to unlock all the hidden characters
*Weapon and hand-to-hand combos
*Character-specific fighting strategies
*Character biographies
*Secret playing modes

==Contents==
===Chapter One: Introduction===
*The Story Line

===Chapter Two: Game Basics===
*Game Controls
*Game Options
*Game Modes
*Gameplay Conventions
*General Hints

===Chapter Three: The Combatants===
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Thok (Gamorrean guard)/Legends|Thok]]
*[[KkH'Oar'Rrhr|Hoar]]
*[[Arden Lyn]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]

===Chapter Four: Endings===
*Luke Skywalker
*Han Solo
*Chewbacca
*Princess Leia Organa
*Boba Fett
*Thok
*Hoar
*Arden Lyn
*Darth Vader

===Chapter Five: Game Secrets===
*Darth Vader
*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]]
*Slave Leia
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]
*[[Jodo Kast]]
*Stage Select
*Cheats
